final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system for web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a "经典简约科技" (classic minimalist tech) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web Dashboard layout, mobile interface layout, card components, button components, and control components
Subject: must include UI components: web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, controls
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-tech atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a tech-forward direction — exact hex values and accent ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs rich layered depth with strong visual hierarchy — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the "视觉炫酷、层次丰富、科技感极强" (visually stunning, rich layers, extremely tech-forward) direction
Avoid:
